title: Daily Bug Triage
summary: Triaged all 5 bugs in bug-triage.csv — enriched with DevOps severity guidance, fix targets, and risk framing. RT-4 flagged as P2 blocker; PC-3 and OB-5 confirmed for current sprint.
contextSummary: RT-4 (reminder 2h late) is the critical dependency — CTO findings due April 18. No server-side delivery telemetry exists until it's fixed. PC-3 and OB-5 are in-sprint and low-risk. SK-2 deferred to P3.
